prd.user_story: As a developer, I want to: Map the major kubelet components in kubernetes/kubernetes owned by sig-node. Find the Go source files that implement: the pod lifecycle manager, the container runtime interface (CRI) client, the volume manager, and the device plugin manager.
constraints: Provide specific file paths and repository names in your answer.
prd.success_definition: Agent successfully identifies relevant files and symbols across all repos in the kubernetes-ecosystem fixture.
